# ERPlora UX

> CSS-only semantic component library for ERPlora apps. ~200 components prefixed `ux-*`. No Tailwind, no SCSS, no JS dependency. Optional runtime interactivity via Datastar `data-*` attributes.

Latest stable: **v2.0.0** · License: MIT · Source: <https://github.com/ERPlora/ux>

Install via CDN:

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ERPlora/ux@v2.0.0/dist/erplora-ux.min.css">
```

Always pin a version tag (`@v2.0.0`), never `@main`.

## Docs

- [README](https://erplora.github.io/ux/README.md): Philosophy, full catalog, Datastar patterns, build steps, deploy.
- [AGENTS.md](https://erplora.github.io/ux/AGENTS.md): Agent-ready instructions — how to use the library, anti-patterns, working examples, token cheatsheet.
- [llms-full.txt](https://erplora.github.io/ux/llms-full.txt): Full machine-readable inventory of every block class with variants and children.
- [Showcase](https://erplora.github.io/ux/): Live preview of every component (`index.html` + `previews/`).

## Source

- [tokens.css](https://erplora.github.io/ux/lib/css/tokens.css): All theme custom properties (`--ux-*`).
- [utilities.css](https://erplora.github.io/ux/lib/css/utilities.css): Layout helpers (`.ux-flex`, `.ux-gap-*`, `.ux-text-*`).
- [ux.css](https://erplora.github.io/ux/lib/css/ux.css): Bundle entrypoint with `@import` graph.
- [components/](https://github.com/ERPlora/ux/tree/main/lib/css/components): Per-component CSS (34 files).

## Optional

- [Datastar](https://data-star.dev): Declarative `data-*` interactivity that complements but does not require this library.
